content.en:
However, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were obviously not in a hurry to come out, but were concentrating on finding forbidden strange things.

After all, I finally entered the forbidden treasure land, and if I didn't look for the forbidden strange things, wouldn't I have wasted this opportunity.

There were many wars in the outside world, a few days passed, and many forces withdrew, but only a very small number of forces obtained the natal talent fruit, after all, there were only 1024 natal talent fruits in total, plus some true ancestors took it themselves, resulting in even fewer natal talent fruits that could be snatched by the major forces.

There are more than 1,000 forces that can participate in the war, and even many generals of Black Wind Mountain have also participated, but Black Wind Mountain has not snatched a few natal talent fruits, and even after the battle, it is not clear who has the natal talent fruit.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

There are still many forces squatting outside the Forbidden Forest, and many forces have sent many True Ancestors under the age of 10 million to enter the Forbidden Forest regardless of the previous agreement, and the goal of these True Ancestors is not to snatch the natal talent fruit, but to find forbidden strange things.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue were not in a hurry, they knew that Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were fine, so they lived in Wanzu City with peace of mind.

......

"Brother, I have made a new discovery here, come here!"

Ye Xingyue sent a message to Ye Xingchen and urged.

After Ye Xingchen received the information, he rushed over as fast as he could.

After a while, Ye Xingchen came to Ye Xingyue's side.

"Brother, there is a passage to the underground space here, I found something good in it!" Ye Xingyue said.

"Let's go, go down and have a look!"

Ye Xingchen was a little curious.

The two of them passed through and came to an underground space.

Here they saw two forbidden curiosities, and very rare forbidden curiosities.

"This is a forbidden weapon and a strange thing, a natural growth forbidden weapon!"

Ye Xingchen exclaimed.

In front of me, there were two forbidden and strange things, and they looked very similar, together they resembled the sun and moon wheels, and apart they were two sharp blades.

Moreover, these two forbidden strange objects have obvious taboo attributes, one is the taboo attribute of the sun, and the other is the taboo attribute of the moon, as if they were born to fit their brother and sister.

"We're so lucky!"

Ye Xingchen was surprised.

Ye Xingyue also nodded again and again, their luck was really good.

For a long time, they can often learn a lot of descriptions and knowledge about forbidden and strange things from their parents, including forbidden strange objects such as weapons.

But this kind of forbidden strange things are too rare, and most of them are disposable weapon forbidden strange things, which are low-grade forbidden strange things, and their value is not high, otherwise many Dao Ancestors would not be eager to create a forbidden weapon.

But the forbidden strange thing in front of him is different, and it almost reached the level of the forbidden treasure.

If these two forbidden objects are allowed to contain them for a long time, they may indeed grow into forbidden treasures.

Moreover, this kind of forbidden weapon with a growth type can completely refine more forbidden strange things and make them stronger, so its value is much higher than that of ordinary forbidden treasures.

"The top-level forbidden treasures are also rare weapon-type forbidden treasures, and they are completely in line with our avenue, they are more precious to us than a low-level forbidden treasure, once they are cultivated well, they can even be cultivated into low-level forbidden treasures or even medium forbidden treasures!"

Ye Xingchen muttered.

"Yes, I'm afraid that if many people have a forbidden arcana, I'm afraid they are willing to exchange some useless forbidden arcanale treasures for this pair of weapon-type forbidden treasures!"

Ye Xingyue followed.

"Why don't you give them a name, the Star Blade and the Star Moon Knife?" Ye Xingchen proposed.

"Okay!" Ye Xingyue replied.

The two of them didn't plan to put the Star Blade and the Star Moon Knife here to slowly breed, but they didn't dare to take them rashly, otherwise it would be dangerous if they caused a great terror.

However, the most important thing in the Forbidden Forest is the Forbidden Bloodline Creature Creatures, and they have also captured some Forbidden Bloodline Creature before, just to deal with this situation.

Immediately.

They unleashed two forbidden bloodline creatures and threw them at the Star Blade and the Star Moon Blade.

Rumble!!!!

The Great Terror was triggered, and the two forbidden bloodline creatures fell and died one after another.

Next, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue released the forbidden bloodline creatures again, and they didn't cause a great terror anymore.

So, the two of them safely took the Star Blade and the Star Moon Knife.

Ye Xingchen obtained the Xingchen Blade, and Ye Xingyue obtained the Xingyue Knife, and they were all very satisfied and put it away.

This kind of weapon forbidden strange thing, after going back, slowly refining, and then a little bit of it, it can be made into a forbidden weapon.

It's just that this place is not suitable for refining at the moment, and there is a lack of some things, so they put it away and wait for it to be refined when they go back.

It is also fortunate that these two forbidden strange objects have not reached the level of forbidden treasures, otherwise once they are taken away, they will produce amazing visions, and they will be easily exposed at that time.

After leaving this space, the two continued to search for forbidden strange objects in the Forbidden Forest, but at this time, the True Ancestors who poured into the Forbidden Forest increased again, and it was more difficult to find the forbidden strange objects again.

So, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were not ready to continue looking.

Wanzu City.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue sensed Ye Xingchen's and Ye Xingyue's breath and hurriedly rushed over.

And when Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue came out, an ordinary invincible true ancestor subconsciously attacked the past.

Bang!!!!

Under the blow, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue joined forces and couldn't stop it.

After all, the gap between the Supreme True Ancestor and the Invincible True Ancestor who had just broken through was still too big, and it would be strange if it could be easily blocked.

But at the critical moment, Ye Tian's strength protected the two of them, so that they did not suffer any damage.

"You dare to attack my son and daughter?"

Ye Tian's gaze was fixed on the invincible True Ancestor.

This invincible true ancestor from the Six Heavens forces immediately turned pale when he saw Ye Tian, and hurriedly explained: "Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, misunderstanding, I didn't see it clearly just now, I didn't know that they were your sons and daughters!"

"No need to explain!"

Ye Tian waved his hand and casually performed a Thousand Dao Technique-Ten Thousand True Spears!

Poof!

This invincible true ancestor was directly pierced by a blow, and his body was completely wiped out.

An invincible true ancestor has fallen.

Ye Xingchen rarely saw his father make a move, and the first time he saw his father make a move was when he was relatively weak, and at that time, his father killed some weak people.

But now seeing that my father killed an invincible true ancestor in an instant, this feeling is too shocking.

"When will I be as strong as my father?"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue murmured in their hearts.

"Let's go, let's go home!"

Ye Tiandao.

Watching Ye Tian take Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue home, no one dared to stop him, the invincible true ancestor who died just now was a lesson from the past!

Even the invincible true ancestor was killed in seconds, and the life-saving thing was useless, which shows how big the difference in strength between the two sides is.

Many Invincible True Ancestors had different feelings, they found that Ye Tian's aura was stronger than before, I am afraid that even the elite level Invincible True Ancestor would be killed by Ye Tian in one blow, and if the top-level Invincible True Ancestor had a poor ability to save his life, it would be the same fate.

Even the kind of invincible true ancestor who was very terrible in protecting his life couldn't block a few moves in front of Ye Tian.

That's how they feel!

---------------

Terran.

Ye Tian, Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue are back.

As soon as possible, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue reported to Ye Tian about their experience in the Forbidden Forest, and immediately took out all the natal talent fruits.

"Father, this is the natal talent fruit for you!"

"Mother, this is the natal talent fruit for you!"

Ye Xingchen gave one by himself, and as for Ye Xingyue's natal talent fruit, he kept all of them to himself.

"My son will be filial to us!"

Ye Tian happily accepted the gift from his son Ye Xingchen.

I thought that Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue's harvest would be for this reason, at most there would be some more forbidden and strange things.

But when the two of them took out the Star Blade and the Star Moon Knife, Ye Tian was shocked.

"This is a forbidden strange thing in the weapon class, and it is a forbidden strange thing at the top limit!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He doesn't have such a forbidden and strange thing!

Moreover, the taboo attributes of these two forbidden strange objects are perfectly matched with the son and daughter, as if they were the companion forbidden strange things.

"My son and daughter are really lucky, I'm afraid they are the sons of luck in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Otherwise, there is no way to explain why their luck is so unlucky, and almost every time they go out, there is a big gain.

This is the Xuanxu Ancient Realm that loves them and brings them good luck again and again.

For this kind of luck, everyone wants it, but they can't envy it.

"These two forbidden strange things are very good, you cultivate them well, they will be very helpful to your strength!" Ye Tian admonished.

"Hmm!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue nodded.
